steps.title: Match corresponding sides
steps.content: The similarity statement gives the vertex order: $Q$ matches $S$, $P$ matches $T$, and $R$ matches $R$. Thus $QP$ corresponds to $ST$, and $QR$ corresponds to $SR$.

steps.title: Write the proportion
steps.content:
Use the corresponding side lengths $QP=15$, $ST=14$, and $QR=25$:
$$
\frac{QR}{SR}=\frac{QP}{ST}
$$
$$
\frac{25}{SR}=\frac{15}{14}
$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing side
steps.content: Cross-multiply and isolate $SR$: $$ 15(SR)=25(14) $$ $$ SR=\frac{350}{15} $$ The answer is A.
